tasks.title: Refactor the extension into explicit command, prompt, state, service, config, and Codex adapter modules
tasks.validation: The source tree is split by responsibility and the extension entrypoint is thin.

tasks.title: Persist Ralph runtime state and artifacts under .ralph with workspace-state sync
tasks.validation: Prompt, run, state, and log artifacts are written to durable files and synced to VS Code workspace storage.

tasks.title: Add pure logic tests and validation scripts
tasks.validation: npm run compile, npm run lint, and npm test succeed.

tasks.title: Add semantic stop conditions beyond a fixed iteration cap
tasks.validation: The Ralph loop can stop when the task is complete or when repeated no-op iterations are detected.

tasks.title: Add optional review or verifier passes after CLI iterations
tasks.validation: A second Codex run can inspect the previous iteration and record findings without sharing chat state.
